headline: Jim Cramer Was Bullish On Arista (ANET) In February 2025 – Stock Is Up By 37%+ Since Then
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the Jim Cramer’s Hottest AI Stock Picks. Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is a computer hardware company that offers products such as data center switches, routers, and networking services to AI infrastructure companies. Its shares are up by 59% over the past year and by 37% since Cramer discussed […]

headline: Nvidia's $1T Guidance Leaves Stock Flat, But These 4 Plays Could Explode
summary: At the GTC 2026 conference, Nvidia laid out a bold vision: Its flagship AI accelerators will help it generate $1 trillion in revenue from 2025 through 2027. That's a massive number for a product buried deep inside massive data centers, invisible to the average person.

headline: 2 AI Infrastructure Stocks TD Cowen Thinks Investors Should Own
summary: AI is setting off one of the largest infrastructure build-outs the tech world has seen. Cloud giants, governments, and startups are pouring enormous sums into new data centers designed to train and run advanced AI models. Much of the discussion tends to revolve around the chips doing the heavy lifting. Yet, another piece of the puzzle matters just as much – how all those machines communicate with one another. Modern AI clusters contain thousands of processors working together at the same time. F
